message:
fix(bv): use double-dash flags for all bv CLI invocations

bv uses standard POSIX long-option syntax (--flag), but ntm was passing
single-dash flags (-flag) everywhere. This caused bv to misparse flags
like -robot-triage as -r obot-triage, failing with "Unknown recipe
'obot-triage'".

Fixed all bv flag arguments across internal/bv/ and internal/tools/bv.go
to use -- prefix, and updated the error message assertion in tests.

Closes #90

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
